name: smartbus-travel-connect-api
description: SmartBus Travel Connect backend API using Express, SQL Server and Modular Monolith architecture.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check app.js && node --check config/env.js && node --check config/db.js && node --check common/utils/cache.util.js && node --check common/utils/gis-validator.util.js && node --check common/utils/pagination.util.js && node --check common/middleware/auth.middleware.js && node --check common/middleware/request-logger.middleware.js && node --check common/utils/sanitize.util.js && node --check common/middleware/role.middleware.js && node --check services/data.service.js && node --check modules/auth/auth.service.js && node --check modules/route/route.repository.js && node --check modules/stop/stop.repository.js && node --check modules/tourism/tourism.repository.js && node --check modules/map/map.routes.js && node --check modules/chat/chat.routes.js && node --check ../frontend/script.js && node --check ../frontend/js/performance.js && node --check ../frontend/js/api.js && node scripts/check.js && node --check scripts/import-smartbus-data.js
